query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=content  ContentPublicVisibilityUpdated
| json "eventName", "contentIdentity.name", "to" as EventName, ContentName, VisibleTo nodrop
| where EventName="ContentPublicVisibilityUpdated"
| withtime VisibleTo
| most_recent(VisibleTo_withtime) by ContentName
| where _mostrecent!="nonpublic"
| count as Count by ContentName
| sort by Count
| limit 10

sources.dashboardDescription: Content - Overview Dashboard provides a high-level view of system activities with data on content activities over time, top applications, top content, publicly accessed content, and exported content. You can also view data on user activity and top content on which permission are added and deleted.
sources.panelTitle: Top Content Made Visible to public
